info.name: Factset Holders of a Company or Fund

params.name: asset_type
params.description: Controls the Asset Type of the data returned

params.name: holder_type
params.description: Controls the Holder Type of the data returned

params.name: topn
params.description:
Limits the number of holders returned based on their Market Value position in the security.  
Default is ALL, otherwise use a valid number above 0.

params.name: date
params.description: Top Holders as of date expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to latest month-end close; non-month-end dates are converted to month-end dates.

items.docs: Holders of a company or fund
